title: stelis quinquenervia
intro: Stelis quinquenervia is a species of orchid native to Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Stelis quinquenervia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
